title: Building Low-Latency RAG Pipelines at Scale
excerpt: How I designed CortexRAG to route queries across difficulty tiers, achieving sub-second latency while reducing unnecessary compute by 60%.

title: Transfer Learning for Medical Imaging: Lessons from 99.85% Accuracy
excerpt: A deep dive into preventing data leakage, choosing the right backbone, and using Grad-CAM for clinical interpretability in brain tumor classification.

title: SAR Imagery and Oil Spill Detection with Vision Transformers
